creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update devel/gettext to 0.18

	-exp run requested

	Priority set to 'medium' since this is affects a bunch of ports
	(the shlib version is bumped) and would thus like to get this in
	before 8.1

Fix: 

Apply patch.  Do -exp run.  ???.  Profit.
How-To-Repeat: 
	http://tinderbox.lovett.com/patches/devel-gettext.diff
